title: Events.jsonl Line
description: Each line of workspace/state/events.jsonl is an independent JSON object validated against this schema. Append-only audit trail. Orchestrator needs only the LAST line to recover (Markov property).

event_id.description: Monotonically increasing or UUID. Unique within the workspace.

iter.description: Current iteration number; 0 before first iteration begins.

agent.description: Agent role associated with this event; empty for Orchestrator-level events.

ref_path.description: Optional pointer to the artifact relevant to this event (e.g. the OSR JSON file).

summary.description: Short human-readable summary of the event.

payload.description: Optional structured data specific to the event_type. Kept small; big data goes to ref_path.
